media.description:
This is Imbued with Love.
It is a 110x90cm wall hanging artwork made from optical fiber textile. It is connected to 99 NFT Weaves, digital tokens that allow their owners to go through a ritual and Imbue the artwork with their own interpretation of love. Each new owner gets to charge the art with even more intention and devotion.
These words are stored on the blockchain forever. The artwork itself connects via Wi-Fi and uses these words to generate the patterns of light and color you see in this video.
What you see when you look at this artwork is the loving words of hundreds, eventually thousands of people, expressed through trough technology. The threads of the weave, becoming tokens of love.
On Friday at 18.00 CET, we release the first 40 NFTs at www.imbuedart.com. Imbued with Love will be auctioned out starting Dec 27.

A gut wrenching story about the power and practices of @[100047580963457:2048:McKinsey & Company], @[100068966267406:2048:KPMG], @[119886118067808:69:PwC] and friends.
And no, I donât blame these companies, or the people that work there. As the the former head of ethics at KPMG once told me: âItâs impossible for these companies to be ethical. The financial incentives to do the wrong thing is just to large.â

Yesterday, GPT-4 came out. Will it break the internet? A digital brain, 500 times as big as its last iteration. What blew your mind a week ago will seem banal.

Iâm releasing my first album!!!
Last winter, Povel Olsson and I composed and produced the music for ANDETAG. Since then 12 000 people have experienced our music at the museum, and we have gotten repeated requests to release it to the public.

It is finally here!

We are now live on Spotify, Apple Music, SoundCloud, YouTube and 50+ other platforms.

Now we need your help:
* Play our music! (Let's get those stream counts up fast!)
* Share your favourite song on social media!
* Put it in your playlists!
* Send it to friends who you know have playlists it would fit on.
* Use it as music for your reels (we're in TikTok and Instagram music libraries too)

The initial boost matters a lot, so if you could take 5 minutes out of your day to support us, it would mean a lot <3
